currentFocus: Docs/state now reflect the integrated test-only PatchBench receipt/source static guards, the next formatter behavior-test baton, no-delete storage posture, and private pre-arm-only runtime baton.

currentDocsTruth.receiptBoundaryStaticGuard: PatchBenchPrimitiveProjectionBoundaryTests is integrated as test-only static guard coverage for future receipt/source presentation helpers. It covers recursive helper/model discovery, path-keyed profiles, sensitive identifiers, GameProfile* rejection, hostile samples, output leak sentinels, and page ownership tripwires. It is not formatter output proof, runtime proof, UIA proof, or extraction readiness by itself.
currentDocsTruth.nextBaton: The next executable documentation/product baton is receipt formatter behavior coverage before extraction: output layout, hostile path/proof-id/command-preview redaction boundaries, online-ready wording rejection, and Host/Join boundary rendering exactly once.
currentDocsTruth.sourceSummaryBoundary: Source-summary extraction remains blocked until path/redaction projection is explicitly tested and raw File/Directory/Path/catalog reads stay page-owned.
currentDocsTruth.projectionContract: The primitive projection note remains a design contract for future helpers. It is not behavior movement, AppCore ownership movement, runtime proof, release readiness, or online-readiness evidence.
currentDocsTruth.scanScope: The static boundary profile scanner covers PatchBench*.cs under WinUI Helpers and Models. BinaryPatchesPage is covered by explicit ownership tripwires. Cross-file primitive support is synthetic until real split receipt/source files are added and wired under the receipt/source profile.
currentDocsTruth.storageSummary: Storage taxonomy is summarized only as read-only/no-delete: high-confidence deletion candidates 0, deletion performed false, authorized reclaimed storage 0 GiB. Future medium/low values are non-authorized logical review ceilings only and should not be presented as reclaimable storage.
currentDocsTruth.runtimeProofBaton: Runtime music proof remains private pre-arm readiness only with readyToRunLiveAttempt=false, liveArmAllowed=false, runtimeAudibleOutputProof=false, and preArmReadiness.status=prearm-readiness-not-proven.
currentDocsTruth.consultEvidence: Use split consult wording: receipt-boundary write worker and repair are six-lane complete; storage and runtime read-only reports are six-lane complete; next-helper read-only is fallback-compliant but matrix-incomplete; consult-compliance smoke had tainted/unavailable lanes and is not independent sanitization verification.
currentDocsTruth.externalSanitization: External consult sanitization is report-attested only unless raw prompts and outputs are separately audited. Do not count unavailable or tainted lanes as successful.
currentDocsTruth.localOnlyBoundary: Tracked docs/state must not include local campaign paths, worktree paths, thread IDs, raw reports, raw manifests, raw proof paths, raw Ghidra paths, hard payload names beyond policy categories, secrets, or private evidence dumps.
currentDocsTruth.claimBoundary: No AppCore behavior, launch argument behavior, selected-state logic, safe-copy planning, process control, patch catalog row, byte patch, Host/Join availability, online readiness, runtime proof, release/publication, gameplay, visual parity, rebuild parity, no-noticeable-difference parity, Ghidra mutation, hard-payload, installed-game, or original-BEA mutation claim changed.

validation.expectation: Use docs/repo/payload gates plus WinUI/focused tests required by the accepted test-only change.
